testcase.name: test_required_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: AAPL: missing price assert 'price' in {'cached_at': '2026-07-12T18:07:12.772486', 'close': 315.32, 'high': 316.765, 'low': 314.78, ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:109: in test_required_fields assert "price" in q, f"{sym}: missing price" E AssertionError: AAPL: missing price E assert 'price' in {'cached_at': '2026-07-12T18:07:12.772486', 'close': 315.32, 'high': 316.765, 'low': 314.78, ...}

testcase.name: test_price_is_positive
testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:127: in test_price_is_positive assert q["price"] > 0, f"{sym}: price={q['price']} not positive" ^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'price'

testcase.name: test_returns_json

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=5000): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)

testcase.failure:
../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:468: in _make_request six.raise_from(e, None) ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:463: in _make_request httplib_response = conn.getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3.12/http/client.py:1448: in getresponse response.begin() /usr/lib/python3.12/http/client.py:336: in begin version, status, reason = self._read_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3.12/http/client.py:297: in _read_status line = str(self.fp.readline(_MAXLINE + 1), "iso-8859-1") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3.12/socket.py:707: in readinto return self._sock.recv_into(b) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TimeoutError: timed out
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/adapters.py:486: in send resp = conn.urlopen( ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:802: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:552: in increment raise six.reraise(type(error), error, _stacktrace) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/packages/six.py:770: in reraise raise value ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:716: in urlopen httplib_response = self._make_request( ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:470: in _make_request self._raise_timeout(err=e, url=url, timeout_value=read_timeout) ../../.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:358: in _raise_timeout raise ReadTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=5000): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:252: in test_returns_json resp = requests.get( /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/api.py:73: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/sessions.py:589: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/sessions.py:703: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/requests/adapters.py:532: in send raise ReadTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=5000): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)

testcase.name: test_error_schema_when_no_data

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=5000): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)

testcase.name: test_status_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:310: in test_status_200 _get("/momentum") tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:30: in _get assert resp.status_code == expect_status, ( E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 503: {"error":"Momentum module not available: No module named 'src.skill_cross_sectional_momentum'"} E E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_congress_trades_schema

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing cluster_buys in congress_trades assert 'cluster_buys' in []

testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:352: in test_congress_trades_schema assert field in ct, f"Missing {field} in congress_trades" E AssertionError: Missing cluster_buys in congress_trades E assert 'cluster_buys' in []

testcase.name: test_fred_indicators
test_required_indicators
testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:457: in test_required_indicators fred = data["macro"]["fred"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'fred'

testcase.name: test_indicator_schema
testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:465: in test_indicator_schema for series_id, indicator in data["macro"]["fred"].items(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'fred'

testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:472: in test_fomc_indicators fred = data["macro"]["fred"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'fred'

testcase.name: test_response_timing

failure.message: AssertionError: /momentum: unexpected status 503 assert 503 in (200, 404) + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_data_bus_smoke.py:566: in test_response_timing assert resp.status_code in (200, 404), ( E AssertionError: /momentum: unexpected status 503 E assert 503 in (200, 404) E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
